session.user: Run `make fast-ci` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report the results. Do not fix any errors.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command in the specified directory and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make fast-ci to execute CI tests

session.assistant:
The command failed with exit code 2. Here are the results:
**Failed: `make fast-ci`**
**Summary:** - 2 files have Prettier formatting issues - All other checks and tests passed
**Issues Found:**
1. **Prettier Formatting Issues (2 files):** - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Passing Checks:** - Ruff linting: All checks passed - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md pairing: Valid - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Format check (ruff): 1739 files already formatted
**Test Results:** - Unit tests (erk): 5920 passed in 25.59s - Tests (erk-dev): 138 passed in 5.33s - Tests (erk-statusline): 123 passed in 0.84s - Tests (erk-mcp): 50 passed
The failure is due to 2 Prettier formatting violations in markdown documentation files. All tests pass successfully.
